episodes.instruction: Head to the kitchen countertop where you'll find a white bowl and a sink. Turn left. Stop once you reach the countertop.
Make your way to the wooden easel by the right wall, and turn left as you go. Stop once you've reached the easel.
Make your way to the doorway at the far end of the hallway, and as you go, swing right. Stop once you reach the doorway.
Head to the dining table that's all set with plates and cutlery. As you go, make sure to turn left. Once you reach the table, stop right in front of it.
Make your way to the small table with chairs in the center of the room. As you move forward, turn right to align with the table's position, and stop once you reach it.
Make your way to the end of the hallway, where you'll find a small table and chair. Turn left. Once you reach the far wall, stop right in the center.
Head to the doorway at the far end of the hallway, and swing left. Stop once you get to the entrance where the floor changes to a lighter color.
Head to the white table by the window, taking a left, and come to a stop once you're in front of the table.
Make your way to the white chair over by the right wall, and come to a stop once you're at the chair.

Make your way to the dining area where you'll find a round table with four chairs. After you come down the staircase, turn right and keep going until you're in line with the table, which is close to the big windows. Stop once you’re right at the center of the dining set.
Make your way to the doorway at the end of the hallway, and as you go, swing right. Stop just before you reach the bottom of the wooden stairs.

Go to the end of the corridor, passing by the window with white curtains. When you get to the staircase, turn left, then take a right to follow along the wall. Stop once you reach the spot where there are two picture frames resting on the floor by the window.
Head to the top of the wooden staircase, making a left turn. Stop at the landing right before the stairs end, where you should be able to see the doorway in front of you.
Head to the end of the hallway, taking a left, and stop once you get to the doorway at the far end.
Head to the refrigerator nestled between the wooden cabinets in the kitchen. As you go, turn right. Once you're aligned with the center of the fridge, come to a stop right in front of it.
Head to the bathroom vanity, taking a left, and pause once you get to the double sink countertop.
Make your way to the refrigerator in the kitchen. When you get to the hallway, take a right. Keep going until you're right in front of the fridge, and stop when you're lined up with its center.
Make your way to the window on the right side of the room. Come to a stop once you reach the window frame where the light is shining in.
Make your way down the hallway, and veer right. Then, stop once you reach the framed artwork hanging on the wall.
Make your way to the white chair in the center of the room, and as you go, turn left. Once you reach the chair, stop there.
Go to the white chair by the right window, turning right as you move forward to get in line with where the chair is, and come to a stop once you reach it.
Make your way to the bathroom sink, taking a left when you need to. Once you're there, stop right in front of the white sink that's next to the mirror and the toilet.
Make your way to the end of the hallway. Stop once you reach the doorway of the room that has a wooden chair inside.
Make your way to the top of the wooden staircase, and as you get close to the corner, swing right to line up with the steps. Stop once you reach the upper landing.
Head down the hallway until you pass the radiator, then take a right. Keep going until you get to the white railing at the bottom of the stairs, and that's where you should stop.

Make your way to the doorway that leads into the living room. As you approach, turn left so you're following the edge of the green flooring. Keep going until you hit the spot where the outdoor and indoor areas meet, then stop there.
Make your way to the white tiered lampshade on the right side of the room. Turn right and keep going until you reach it, then stop.
Make your way to the spot in front of the two framed artworks hanging on the right wall, and turn right. Stop once you're at the paintings.
Make your way to the white chair by the window, but be sure to turn left to the center-left of the room. Once you reach the chair, stop right in front of it.
Make your way to the corner where the wall and window frame come together, and as you go, turn left. Stop once you're at the bottom of the window, right in line with the vertical edge of its frame.
Make your way to the base of the staircase on the right side of the room. Turn left and come to a stop once you reach the white railing next to the wooden steps.
Make your way to the bedroom door, and as you go, swing left a bit. You'll know you've arrived when you're at the doorway with the bed and window in clear view behind it.
Make your way to the top of the wooden staircase, and as you go, be sure to turn left when necessary. Stop once you reach the landing area by the doorway.
Head to the top of the wooden staircase, and as you go, swing left. Stop once you reach the landing where the wall meets the ceiling.
Make your way to the base of the staircase. First, take a left, then swing right to line up with the stairs. Stop once you hit the bottom step.
Make your way to the white chair by the right wall, and if you come across any obstacles, go ahead and turn left to get around them. Once you reach the chair, stop right in front of it.
Make your way to the wooden easel by the right wall, swerving left a bit, and come to a stop once you're at the easel.
Head to the bottom of the wooden staircase, and turn left. Stop once you reach the point where the floor meets the first step.
Make your way to the spot where the white wall meets the wooden floor, close to the baseboard. As you go, turn left. Stop once you get to where the wall and floor intersect.
Make your way to the sink area under the kitchen window. Stop once you reach the countertop with the faucet.
Make your way to the white chair and small table in the middle of the room, veering left, and come to a stop once you reach the furniture.
Make your way to the bottom of the staircase on the right side of the room, and turn left. Stop once you reach the wooden steps next to the white wall.

Go to the spot where the two white walls come together. Turn right from where you are now, so you're following along the baseboard. Stop once you get to the corner, close to that little object on the floor.
Make your way to the wooden staircase on the right side of the room, and as you do, turn left. Stop once you reach the bottom step next to the white railing.
Head to the chair by the far wall, and as you go, be sure to turn left. Once you reach the chair, stop right in front of it.
Head to the whiteboard on the left wall by the window, and as you go, turn right. Stop once you're at the center of the whiteboard.
Make your way to the foot of the bed in the bedroom, and be sure to turn left. Stop once you reach the bed.
Make your way to the base of the staircase on the left side of the room. As you approach, turn right. Stop once you reach the bottom step where the wooden stairs start to climb.
Head to the doorway at the end of the hallway, and as you go, turn left. Keep moving forward and come to a stop when you reach the spot where the wooden floor meets the white wall.
Head to the dining table in the middle of the room, and turn left by the rug. Stop once you get to the table.
Head to the dining area where you'll find a round table with four chairs. As you go, turn left. Stop once you're at the table that's right in front of the chairs.
Make your way to the end of the hallway, and go left. Stop once you reach the doorway where you can see the wooden stairs and the white doorframe.

Make your way to the glowing white cube-shaped lamp in the corner. Turn right at the first opportunity, then take another right to get yourself aligned with it. Once you're on the right path, keep going until you reach the lamp, and come to a stop right in front of it.
Go to the window on the far wall, and after you move forward, turn right to get in line with where the window is. Stop right in front of it once you're there.
Go to the spot where the two walls come together and you'll see a pile of white boxes. Turn right if necessary to get yourself lined up with that corner, and then stop right in front of the boxes.
Head to the end of the hallway, near the far wall. Make sure to turn right. Stop once you reach the window.
Make your way to the window on the back wall. After you move forward from the staircase, take a right, and once you reach the window, stop there.
Go to the spot where the two white walls come together. Turn left and keep going straight until you're lined up with where the walls meet, then stop right at the corner's edge.
Make your way to the dining table in the middle of the room, and turn right. Stop once you reach the table that's surrounded by those black chairs.
Make your way to the white chair in the corner by the window, and be sure to turn left. Once you reach the chair, come to a stop.
Make your way to the wooden chair by the back wall, and as you go, turn left. Once you're in line with the center of the chair, come to a stop.
Head to the bottom of the staircase, and as you go, turn left. Stop once you reach the spot where the wooden steps meet the floor.
Make your way to the wooden staircase on the right side of the room, and as you go, turn left. Stop once you reach the white railing at the bottom of the stairs.
Make your way to the corner by the window. Turn right so you're lined up with the wall, then keep going straight until you get to the base of the window and stop there.
Make your way to the doorway at the end of the hallway, and take a right. Once you get to the threshold, just by the window on the left, that's where you should stop.
Make your way to the kitchen sink by the window. Stop once you've reached the sink beside the countertop.
Make your way to the center of the patterned rug, and as you do, turn left. Stop once you're in the middle of the rug, close to where the two blue cushions are placed.
Make your way to the center of the room, where you'll find a large black-and-white patterned rug. Turn left. Stop once you're in front of the rug.
Make your way to the white chair up ahead, taking a few right turns as needed, and come to a stop once you reach the chair.
Make your way to the center of the room where the large patterned rug is, and as you go, be sure to turn right. Once you reach the rug, come to a stop in front of it.

Go to the small round table with two chairs by the window. After you step away from the staircase area, take a right turn. Keep going until you're right in front of the table, making sure you're aligned with both the window and the wall next to it.
Make your way to the white chair near the center-right of the room, and as you go, be sure to turn left. Once you reach the chair, come to a stop.

Make your way to the small table and chairs in the center of the room. Turn left, then left again, and finally take a right to align with the window. Once you reach the table, stop right in front of it.

Head to the base of the staircase in the far corner, and as you go, turn left. Stop once you reach the bottom of the stairs, where you'll see the wooden floor meeting the white wall and the stair railing starting.
Make your way to the bathroom vanity, and as you go, take a right turn from the kitchen. Once you get there, stop right in front of the white sink that has a mirror above it.
Head to the doorway at the far end of the room, and as you go, swing right. Stop just before you enter the next room.
Head to the left side of the room, where you'll find a staircase. Turn left from your starting position to line up with the stairs, and stop once you reach the bottom step next to the white handrail.
Make your way to the wooden easel in the corner by the window, and as you go, turn left. Stop once you've reached the easel.
Make your way to the corner of the room by the window, take a left and keep going until you hit the window frame, then stop.
Head to the doorway that leads into the bedroom, and as you go, turn right. Stop once you reach the spot where the white wall meets the wooden floor and you can see the bed off to your right.
Make your way to the end of the hallway. Stop once you reach the doorway that leads into the next room.
Make your way to the white chair close to the staircase. As you approach, turn left and once you're in front of the chair, go ahead and stop there.
Make your way to the small round table by the window on the right, and as you go, be sure to turn left. Stop once you arrive at the table.
Make your way to the wooden bench in the corner of the room by turning right and heading straight ahead, then come to a stop once you're directly in front of it.
Head to the doorway of the bedroom, and as you go, turn left. Keep going until you get to the edge of the living room, where the white partition meets the open area, and then stop there.
Make your way to the corner of the room by the window, turning left, and come to a stop once you reach the window.
Make your way to the window on the left wall, take a couple of right turns to get in line with the natural light, and come to a stop once you're right in front of it.
Make your way to the corner of the room by the vertical window on the right. Stop once you're at the spot where the two walls meet, right in front of that narrow window.
Make your way to the dining table in the center of the room, and as you go, swing left. Once you reach the table, come to a stop.
Head to the end of the hallway, close to the doorway. As you go, turn left moving away from the camera. Stop right before you get to the doorway, where you'll see some furniture on your right.

Make your way to the dining area where you'll find a white table and chairs. After you pass by the staircase, take a right, and then stop once you're in the middle of the open space in front of the table.
Make your way to the foot of the bed in the bedroom. As you go, turn left. Stop once you're facing the bed.
Make your way to the top of the wooden staircase. Once you reach the landing by the white door on the left, that's where you should stop.
Make your way to the spot in front of those two ship pictures propped up against the wall under the high window. Stop once you're right in front of the frames.
Make your way to the bathroom vanity, taking a left. Stop once you get to the double sink with the mirror hanging above and the wooden cabinet underneath.
Make your way to the bedroom doorway, and as you go, turn left. Stop right at the threshold, just inside the door, with the bed in front of you.
Make your way to the base of the white staircase on the right side of the room. As you go, turn left. Stop once you reach the wooden floor at the stairwell.

Make your way to the desk up ahead on the right side of the room. Start by turning left, then swing right to line up with it. Once you're in front of the wooden surface where the laptop and papers are, go ahead and stop there.
Make your way to the dining table at the far end of the room. Turn left. Stop when you reach the white table with chairs under the window.
Head to the desk area in the lower right corner, take a left. Stop once you spot the blue object on the desk.
Make your way to the small white table by the right-side window, taking a right turn to avoid the staircase on your left, and come to a stop once you reach the table.

Head to the corner of the room by the window and baseboard. From the staircase area, turn left, then make a right as you approach the wall where you can spot a small object on the floor. Stop once you reach the corner in front of the wall next to the window.
